user.title: Button Card Template Sync
user.description: Create one sync entry for one template folder and one storage-mode dashboard.

data_description.name: Display name for this sync entry and its generated entities. Leave empty to derive a dashboard-based name.
data_description.template_folder: Folder inside the Home Assistant config directory that contains the button-card template YAML files. Do not include a trailing slash. Version 1 reads YAML files directly in this folder, not nested subfolders.
data_description.target_dashboard: Storage-mode dashboard that will receive the merged top-level button_card_templates block.
data_description.dry_run: When enabled, sync only validates and builds the dashboard patch in memory. It does not write the dashboard or create a backup.
data_description.auto_sync: When enabled, polls the template folder for stable changes and syncs only after the change is seen across consecutive polls.
data_description.backup_before_write: When enabled, real sync stores a backup of the previous dashboard config before writing.
data_description.backup_retention_count: Maximum number of backups to keep for this sync entry. Old backups for this entry are removed automatically.
data_description.poll_interval_seconds: Auto-sync polling interval in seconds. Polling checks for stable folder changes and does not force-write every interval.

error.folder_outside_config: Template folder must be inside the Home Assistant config directory.

init.title: Button Card Template Sync options
init.description: Adjust this dashboard sync entry. The generated entities can also control daily options.
